root_cause.explanation: markMessagesRead only fires via onSelectContact callback (main.tsx:2419-2425). When new messages arrive in an already-selected conversation, onSelectContact does not fire again because the contact is already selected. Therefore, messages arriving in an open conversation remain unread indefinitely.
sequence: User selects contact -> onSelectContact fires -> markMessagesRead called
New messages detected -> unreadCounts updated for selected contact
onSelectContact does NOT fire (contact already selected)
markMessagesRead never called -> messages remain unread -> badge persists

evidence.description: onSelectContact callback - only fires on selection change, not when messages arrive
useEffect polling refreshUnreadCounts every 3 seconds - updates counts but doesn't trigger mark-as-read
markMessagesRead implementation - correctly updates DB and state, but never called for incoming messages in open conversation

changes.change: Add a useEffect that watches [selectedIdentityId, selectedContactId, nostling.unreadCounts]. When unreadCounts[selectedIdentityId]?.[selectedContactId] > 0, call nostling.markMessagesRead(selectedIdentityId, selectedContactId).
changes.reason: Automatically marks messages as read when they arrive in the currently-selected conversation, fixing the root cause of messages remaining unread

invariants.api_contracts: No API changes - uses existing markMessagesRead function
invariants.existing_behavior: Existing onSelectContact behavior unchanged - still marks messages read on manual selection
invariants.performance: No degradation - useEffect only fires when dependencies change (contact selection or unread count update)
invariants.backward_compatibility: Fully backward compatible - only adds auto-marking behavior, does not remove any existing functionality

similar_patterns_fixed: None - this is the only location where unread badge clearing is handled

verification_criteria: Bug reproduction test 'REGRESSION TEST: After fix, auto-mark messages read when they arrive in open conversation' PASSES
Manual test: messages arriving in already-open conversation are auto-marked read
Manual test: clicking contact with unread messages still marks them read (existing behavior preserved)
Manual test: unread badge clears immediately when messages arrive in open conversation
